beats.activity: Wake up, feed Koji, coffee on the porch with the dog while the city wakes.
beats.reasoning: Sunday morning ritual—quiet start with Koji before the day opens up. Low energy yesterday (35/100) means he'll take this slow and deliberate.

beats.activity: Drive to Discovery Park for an early morning trail run before the crowds arrive.
beats.reasoning: Cyrus has hit Discovery Park three days in a row—it's his reset valve. Sunday morning, before boat traffic and families arrive, is perfect. Sunny 72F day is ideal for running.

beats.activity: Trail run on the bluff trails, finishing at the overlook to watch the Sound.
beats.reasoning: His go-to place for clearing his head. Calm weather and Sunday solitude make this a restorative run rather than a hard push.

beats.activity: Drive back to Ballard, stop at Safeway for groceries and a few errands.
beats.reasoning: After the run, a quick errand stop on the way home keeps the day efficient. Frugal Cyrus plans meals around what he cooks, not takeout.

beats.activity: Shop for groceries and a few kitchen staples.
beats.reasoning: Sunday market run. Cyrus prefers simple, predictable meals he can cook himself.
Short hop back to base. Cyrus settles in for the midday wind-down.

beats.activity: Prepare and eat a simple lunch at home with Koji, then relax on the porch.
beats.reasoning: Sunday lunch ritual. Cyrus cooks simple food and values quiet time with his dog over going out.

beats.activity: Drive to Green Lake Park for a casual walk around the lake with Koji, avoiding the peak afternoon boat traffic.; Walk around the lake with Koji, enjoy the sunshine and mild weather.
beats.reasoning: Sunny 72F day invites outdoor time. Green Lake is a neighborhood spot—lower key than Discovery Park on a Sunday, good for dog-walking and people-watching.
Evening is setting in. Cyrus heads home to settle for the rest of the day.

beats.activity: Read on the porch with Koji, prepare a simple dinner.
beats.reasoning: Sunday wind-down. Cyrus spends time with a book and his dog, then cooks something straightforward. No social obligations, just his routine.

beats.activity: Eat dinner at home, spend the evening on the porch watching the light fade with Koji.
beats.reasoning: Evening meal and wind-down routine. Cyrus is already home and content—no late-night outings on a Sunday.

world_event_prompt: Calm, sunny Sunday, high of 72F. Quiet end-of-week day with no major disruptions. Lake Union sees heavy recreational boat and paddle traffic in the afternoon.
